design_philosophy.core_loop: Select gadgets at level start, execute combo-based beat 'em up sequences using move lists and key sequences, progress through stages with time limits
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Mastering move list execution and gadget selection while managing time pressure and limited continues
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Playing as Batman or Robin with movie-accurate digitized sprites, using iconic gadgets in combat
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Heavy reliance on motion-capture digitized sprites (licensed from film production) over hand-drawn animation; gadget pre-selection system forces strategic loadout decisions before each level rather than dynamic gadget switching

difficulty.continues_system: Limited continues system criticized by reviewers as frustratingly restrictive
difficulty.checkpointing: Stage-based progression with time limits in later stages (notably stage 3)
difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Players can customize gadget loadouts (3 standard + 2 chosen from list + 4 hidden blueprints) to adjust difficulty approach, but core execution difficulty remains high

progression.upgrade_system: Gadget selection system: players choose from available gadgets at each level start (3 standard per character, 2 from available list, 4 hidden blueprint gadgets)
progression.unlock_mechanism: Hidden blueprint gadgets unlock through gameplay discovery; gadget availability varies by character (Batman vs Robin)
replayability_hooks: Two-player co-op modes with separate mechanics (shared credits vs separate credits, harmless vs harmful teammate attacks)
Training/fighting game mode allowing play as any enemy character
Multiple gadget loadout combinations to experiment with

world_building_techniques: Movie tie-in licensing (characters in film attire on PC version)
Digitized motion-capture sprites creating visual connection to film

faction_indicators: Co-op mode split between cooperative (shared fate) vs competitive (separate scoring) playstyles
danger_signals: Punching feedback delayed well after enemy death (reviewer complaint suggesting unclear combat feedback)
Time limits in later stages creating pressure dynamics

data_quality_notes: T3 tier data: Wikipedia source provides structural and reception information but lacks detailed gameplay design documentation. Boss design section unavailable in source. Core loop and difficulty philosophy inferred from gameplay descriptions and critical feedback.
